title_en: The IGN Live 2026 Lineup Is Massive: See Which Stars from Jackass, Avatar, Rick and Morty, and WWE Are Heading to Los Angeles for Special Panels and Reveals
summary_en: Get ready for IGN Live 2026 in Los Angeles with the full celebrity and special guest lineup, featuring talent from Jackass, Avatar, Rick and Morty, WWE, and more.
body_en:
IGN Live 2026 is headed to Los Angeles and streaming globally June 6-7. Filled with exclusive reveals, tons of trailers, 170 gaming stations , celebrity interviews, special panels, advance screenings , and more, the event is shaping up to be a huge celebration of everything fans of games, TV, movies, comics, and collectibles love.
Tickets are still on sale, so be sure to check out the full schedule (or catch how to watch the event if you can't be there in person).
On top of all that, IGN Live 2026 will feature an epic line-up of A-list talent from all your favorite games, shows, and movies. Here's a rundown of everyone you can expect to see at IGN Live 2026.
Jackass: Best and Last
Avatar: The Last Airbender
Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed
Roger Craig Smith (Sonic the Hedgehog, Batman, and more)
Patricia Summersett (Princess Zelda, Zyssyk from Star Wars Outlaws, and others)
New Rockstars
WWE Superstars
The Legend of Vox Machina
Rick and Morty
Big Brother
McFarlane Toys
Deli Boys
The Death of Robin Hood
The Terror: Devil in Silver
My Adventures with Superman
WEBTOON
Star Trek 60th Anniversary from IDW Comics
Control Resonant
Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced
Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis
Backyard Baseball
Ark: Survival Ascended
Bellwright
Gothic Remake
007 First Light
Grave Seasons
NVIDIA
Stage Tour
Panel Celebrating Queer Artists and Creators
Plus we’ll have tons of surprise guests we can’t mention quite yet. Check back later this week for more announcements!
